content:
Operating units included on the affiliation agreement with corresponding schools are listed below. Emory Rehabilatation and Budd Terrace are not included on any of the affiliation agreements.
EUH - Emory University Hospital; EUOSH - Emory University Orthopaedic and Spine Hospital;
EWW - Emory Wesley Woods Hospital; EUHM - Emory University Hospital Midtown;
ESJH - Emory Saint Joseph's Hospital; EJCH - Emory Johns Creek Hospital; TEC - The Emory Clinic; ESA - Emory Specialty Associates; EDH - Emory Decatur Hospital; EHH - Emory Hillandale Hospital; ELTAC - Emory Long Term Acute Care; EHWR - Emory Hospital Warner Robins, EHP - Emory Hospital Perry DeKalb Clinics - DeKalb Medical Primary Care Group and DeKalb Medical Specialty Care Group.
